name: Western Union
description_short: 9000 Beechnut St, Houston, TX: Western Union offers check cashing and money transfer services with extended hours Mon-Sat 8AM-8PM.
description_long:
Western Union at 9000 Beechnut St, Houston, TX operates as a standalone check-cashing location serving the Houston area. The store is open Monday through Saturday from 8AM to 8PM, making it accessible during standard business hours with convenient evening services. This Houston location provides walk-in service for residents and visitors needing quick financial transactions.

This Houston, TX Western Union location offers check cashing, bill payment, and money transfer services. Customers can reach the store at +1 713-270-9405 for inquiries about specific services, rates, or to confirm availability before visiting. The staff can answer questions about acceptable identification and transaction limits.

For Houston residents, this Beechnut Street location provides essential financial services when traditional banking isn't an option. Bring valid government-issued ID and arrive during business hours, especially on weekends when other options may have limited availability. The Houston location keeps extended hours through 8PM on weekdays and opens Saturdays, making evening and weekend access feasible.
pros: Extensive agent location network with multiple service points across the U.S.
Multilingual support in six languages including Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Multiple service options: wire transfers, cash pickup, bill payment, mobile top-ups, and inmate payments
Western Union Rewards program for repeat customers
Prepaid card option for receiving money
Online registration and account management available
cons: Fees for transfers can be substantial depending on amount and destination country
Location-dependent service availability—not all agent locations offer all services
Website shows service unavailability issues (Orange wallet temporarily unavailable at time of scrape)
Limited transparency on fee structures from homepage
Requires in-person visit to pickup cash, limiting convenience for some users
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers without access to traditional banking
Immigrants sending money to family in home countries
Individuals needing quick cash access without a bank account or credit card
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers and immigrants needing affordable international money transfer with physical cash pickup options. The main caveat is that fees can be high relative to digital alternatives, and service availability depends on agent location partnerships.
services: Domestic and international wire transfers (send money)
meta_description: Houston, TX: Western Union at 9000 Beechnut St. Check cashing and money transfers, open Mon-Sat 8AM-8PM.
